name: network
description: 网络接口 + 公网 IP（本地接口表 + 一次性 ipify 探测）
command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object {$_.IPAddress -ne '127.0.0.1' -and $_.PrefixOrigin -ne 'WellKnown'} | Select-Object InterfaceAlias,IPAddress | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String"
